# aaqueen-ecom — Deployment

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:deploy -->
## Android

- Gradle: `android/app/build.gradle` or `build.gradle.kts`
- Output: `build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/`

## iOS

- Xcode project under `ios/`

## Web

- `web/index.html` when Flutter web is enabled

## CI/CD files

- `.github/workflows/build-web.yml`
- `.github/workflows/build-android.yml`
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
